primarySource.label: The Best Decks out of Bologna
primarySource.description: RQ Bologna saw all 28 Legends battle to supremacy, here’s the Best-Of decks and the Top 8!

sources.label: The Best Decks out of Bologna
sources.description: RQ Bologna saw all 28 Legends battle to supremacy, here’s the Best-Of decks and the Top 8!

sources.label: Bologna Regional Qualifier summary page
sources.description: Community summary page used to recover structured legend rows and fallback deck slugs.

eventPrimarySource.label: The Best Decks out of Bologna
eventPrimarySource.description: RQ Bologna saw all 28 Legends battle to supremacy, here’s the Best-Of decks and the Top 8!

decklistSource.label: Ezreal official best-of decklist
decklistSource.description: Decklist parsed directly from the official Riot/Riftbound event recap.

secondaryDeckSources.label: Ezreal Riftbound.gg best-of deck
secondaryDeckSources.description: Trusted Riftbound.gg Best of Legend deck reference preserved as a secondary source.

resolvedCard.name: Fizz - Trickster
resolvedCard.effect: When you play me, you may play a spell from your trash with Energy cost no more than :rb_energy_3:, ignoring its Energy cost. Recycle that spell after you play it. (You must still pay its Power cost.)

resolvedCard.name: Mindsplitter
resolvedCard.effect: When you play me, choose an opponent. They reveal their hand. Choose a card from it, and they discard that card.

resolvedCard.name: Ravenbloom Student
resolvedCard.effect: When you play a spell, give me +1 :rb_might: this turn.

resolvedCard.name: Rhasa the Sunderer
resolvedCard.effect: I cost :rb_energy_1: less for each card in your trash.

resolvedCard.name: Thousand-Tailed Watcher
resolvedCard.effect:
[Accelerate] (You may pay :rb_energy_1::rb_rune_mind: as an additional cost to have me enter ready.)
When you play me, give enemy units -3 :rb_might: this turn, to a minimum of 1 :rb_might:.

resolvedCard.name: Vex - Cheerless
resolvedCard.effect: While I'm in combat, friendly spells cost :rb_energy_1::rb_rune_rainbow: less to a minimum of :rb_energy_1:, and enemy spells cost :rb_energy_1::rb_rune_rainbow: more.

resolvedCard.name: Arcane Shift
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Banish a friendly unit, then its owner plays it, ignoring its cost. Deal 3 to an enemy unit at a battlefield. Banish this.

resolvedCard.name: Bellows Breath
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
[Repeat] :rb_energy_1::rb_rune_mind: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Deal 1 to up to three units at the same location.

resolvedCard.name: Called Shot
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
[Repeat] :rb_rune_chaos: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Look at the top 2 cards of your Main Deck. Draw one and recycle the other.

resolvedCard.name: Frigid Touch
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
[Repeat] :rb_energy_2: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Give a unit -2 :rb_might: this turn.

resolvedCard.name: Hard Bargain
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
[Repeat] :rb_energy_2: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Counter a spell unless its controller pays :rb_energy_2:.

resolvedCard.name: Morbid Return
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Return a unit from your trash to your hand.

resolvedCard.name: Rebuke
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Return a unit at a battlefield to its owner's hand.

resolvedCard.name: Retreat
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Return a friendly unit to its owner's hand. Its owner channels 1 rune exhausted.

resolvedCard.name: Singularity
resolvedCard.effect: Deal 6 to each of up to two units.

resolvedCard.name: Smoke Screen
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Give a unit -4 :rb_might: this turn, to a minimum of 1 :rb_might:.

resolvedCard.name: Stacked Deck
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Look at the top 3 cards of your Main Deck. Put 1 into your hand and recycle the rest.

resolvedCard.name: Stupefy
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Give a unit -1 :rb_might: this turn, to a minimum of 1 :rb_might:. Draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: Wages of Pain
resolvedCard.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Deal 3 to a unit at a battlefield. Play a Gold gear token exhausted.

resolvedCard.name: Seal of Discord
resolvedCard.effect: :rb_exhaust:: [Reaction] — [Add] :rb_rune_chaos:. (Abilities that add resources can't be reacted to.)

resolvedCard.name: Obelisk of Power
resolvedCard.effect: At the start of each player's first Beginning Phase, that player channels 1 rune.

resolvedCard.name: Sigil of the Storm
resolvedCard.effect: When you conquer here, you must recycle one of your runes. (This doesn’t choose anything.)

resolvedCard.name: Void Gate
resolvedCard.effect: Spells and abilities deal 1 Bonus Damage to units here. (Each instance of damage the spell deals to a unit here is increased by 1.)

resolvedCard.name: Downwell
resolvedCard.effect: Return all units and gear to their owners' hands.

resolvedCard.name: Dr. Mundo - Expert
resolvedCard.effect:
My Might is increased by the number of cards in your trash.
At the start of your Beginning Phase, recycle 3 from your trash.

resolvedCard.name: Factory Recall
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Return a gear to its owner's hand.

resolvedCard.name: Pickpocket
resolvedCard.effect: When you play me, you may kill a gear with Energy cost no more than :rb_energy_1:. If you do, play a Gold gear token exhausted.

resolvedCard.name: Rebuke
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Return a unit at a battlefield to its owner's hand.

resolvedCard.name: Rocket Barrage
resolvedCard.effect:
[Repeat] :rb_energy_4::rb_rune_mind: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect, and may make different choices.)
Choose one —Deal 4 to a unit in a base.Kill a gear.
